tldr.title: Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading the prompt; OpenCode sends 7k
tldr.author: systima
bullets: Empirical API logs reveal Anthropic's Claude Code incurs massive token overhead compared to OpenCode, rapidly inflating deployment costs.
The efficiency gap stems from Claude Code's poorly optimized prompt caching strategy and bloated internal harness token usage.
AI practitioners should benchmark agentic CLI tools, as unoptimized system prompts can silently multiply Anthropic API consumption.

tldr.title: InfiniteDiffusion: Bridging Learned Fidelity and Procedural Utility for Open-World Terrain Generation
tldr.author: Yogthos
bullets: Combines diffusion models with procedural generation to synthesize seamless, infinite-resolution heightmaps and terrains for open-world game engines.
Uses spatial conditioning and tiling latent diffusion to eliminate boundary seams while maintaining consistent, realistic geological erosion features.
Provides deterministic control over massive terrain layouts by using low-frequency procedural noise as a guide for high-fidelity neural upscaling.

tldr.title: An update on the scraper situation
tldr.author: fanf
bullets: AI scrapers increasingly bypass robots.txt, causing denial-of-service conditions on forums and requiring active IP-level and user-agent mitigation.
Security teams deploy Cloudflare WAF rules, rate-limiting, and JA4 fingerprinting to differentiate aggressive AI bots from legitimate search indexers.
Tightening scraper defenses frequently causes collateral damage, accidentally blocking legitimate RSS readers, API consumers, and web archival tools.

tldr.title: Package Management as Org Chart
tldr.author: calvin
bullets: Package boundaries reflect Conway's Law; split registries like Artifactory or Nexus mirror team silos, complicating cross-team CI/CD pipelines.
Monorepos simplify dependency management, while multi-repo setups require automated tooling like Renovate or Dependabot to prevent version drift.
Decentralized artifact publishing increases risk; enforce centralized governance and SBOM scanning to mitigate inner-source dependency confusion attacks.

tldr.title: The real mystery behind Moana: After 1,700 years, why did Polynesians suddenly sailВ east?
tldr.author: David Sear, Manoj Joshi, and Mark Peaple, The Conversation
bullets: Advanced climate modeling reconstructs historical wind anomalies, showing how favorable sailing windows enabled long-distance Pacific migrations.
Researchers utilize paleoclimate proxy data and ocean current simulations to map precise windows of ancient maritime exploration.
The findings demonstrate how modern computational simulation and meteorological datasets resolve historic anthropological and migration debates.
